name: Polish Lenten Mushroom "Cutlets" (Kotelty z G
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the mushrooms in a large frying pan and sauté them with the onions using 3 tablespoons of butter.
2. Soak the cubed hard rolls in milk for about 10 minutes.
3. Add the soaked rolls to the mushroom-onion mixture.
4. Blend in the eggs, parsley, salt, and pepper.
5. Form the mixture into cutlet-shaped patties, with each patty taking about 3 to 4 tablespoons of the mixture.
6. Press the patties onto breadcrumbs.
7. Fry until crisp and brown on both sides.
Variation: You could substitute dried mushrooms for part or all of the fresh mushrooms. They are a favorite among the Polish for their rich and interesting flavor."
